_README: Fictional demo takeoff. Quantities are fake and source-backed only for pipeline testing.
scope_rule: Base bid is limited to permanent fences, gates, gate hardware, and fence/gate-specific accessories. Adjacent scopes must be explicitly included, excluded, or flagged before pricing.
latest_revision_basis: Addendum 01 revising fence run to 420 LF
project_details: 100 Demo Service Road, Example City, ST
Base bid is limited to permanent fences, gates, gate hardware, and fence/gate-specific accessories. Adjacent scopes must be explicitly included, excluded, or flagged before pricing.
Addendum 01 revises fence run from 400 LF to 420 LF.
Permanent chain link fence, G-1 double swing gate, and gate hardware.
Bollards, concrete, paving, temporary fence, silt fence, tree protection fence, electrical/access-control wiring, guardrail, and handrail.

Bollards, concrete, paving, temporary fence, silt fence, and tree protection fence
scope_summary.notes: Shown for coordination only or by others.

bom.description: 8 FT high galvanized chain link fence with posts, top rail, fabric, accessories, and three strands barbed wire.
24 FT double swing gate including gate posts, frames, truss rods, and accessories.
Latch, hinges, panic hardware, and gate-specific accessories for G-1.
bom.source: A1.0 p1, A7.2 p2, Section 32 31 13 p1

bom.description: Bollards, concrete mow strip, and paving restoration shown for coordination only.

Guardrail and handrail at loading dock are review-only adjacent architectural metals scope.
bom.quote_notes: Flag before pricing; not base bid.

bom.description: Gate operator, keypad, card reader, conduit, wiring, and electrical power are alternate or by Division 26.
bom.quote_notes: Do not include in base bid unless separately accepted.

Gate operators are not included unless specifically identified as an accepted alternate.
Product data, shop drawings, and hardware schedule.
